nodes.label: AI as collaborative thinking partner
nodes.grounding_span: I use it for ideation -- developing hypotheses and building frameworks

nodes.label: AI writing support for high-stakes output
nodes.grounding_span: AI doesn't come close to writing them for me, but it can take my bare bones outline and write a very rough draft

nodes.label: Trust in AI for qualitative nuance
nodes.label_negative: Distrust in AI for qualitative nuance
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust AI to find impactful quotes or qualitative nuance

nodes.label: AI distillation of extensive notes
nodes.grounding_span: AI is good at distilling that into a few core points, and said well

nodes.label: AI as quality enhancer and time saver
nodes.grounding_span: I am interested in collaboration and finding ways to improve the quality of my work by say, 10% and reduce the time to do it by 10%

nodes.label: Human expertise and credibility in storytelling
nodes.grounding_span: the premise is the conclusions are by experts and they have credibility with decisionmakers in the industry

nodes.label: Organizational need for feasible AI use cases
nodes.label_negative: Unrealistic AI expectations leading to failure
nodes.grounding_span: Orgs and employees alike need feasible use cases

nodes.label: High-quality client deliverables
nodes.grounding_span: The work I produce is expensive and for demanding clients and I take pride in it

nodes.label: Personal understanding and narrative building
nodes.grounding_span: going through the data slowly myself helps me write the story and build the framework in my mind

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: reduce the time to do it by 10%

nodes.label: Credibility and trustworthiness
nodes.grounding_span: the conclusions are by experts and they have credibility with decisionmakers

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI distillation
nodes.grounding_span: Satisfied when it makes sense of things

nodes.label: Frustration with AI writing tics
nodes.grounding_span: its incessant use of the dash to get out of tricky writing situations is frustrating

nodes.label: Optimistic but cautious about AI disruption
nodes.grounding_span: I'm optimistic it won't hurt workers... Nevertheless, it could be very very disruptive

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth refinement
nodes.grounding_span: It's a back and forth -- sometimes big picture, sometimes a narrow issue

nodes.label: Deliberate hands-on engagement with raw data
nodes.grounding_span: I like to do that myself because I don't trust AI to find impactful quotes
